reviews.review_description: My son have so much fun with game. He have a lot fun running round and make him good exercise
This is really making you sweat and have fun! It is much better than static fitness apps

Taking a break from the normal run of the mill games and who can’t pass up a saber game.  Was a bit awkward at first running on the spot, actually jumping in real life.  A refreshing concept to the traditional saber games where it’s just your arms doing the actions with a little bit of body movement. It wasn’t long before I realised how unfit I was and how much this will help.  Great concept and good to see games evolve.  Reminds me of the old Nintendo WII days although the immersion is unreal.  This will be one of those games that will bring you back for a bit of cardio.  Can’t wait to see it evolve into some other challenges that looks at this fitness aspect.

Had a lot of fun with this workout. You can a jog on the spot and jump as well as slice things up. Good total body workout which can be more active depending on the effort put into it.  Making the most of it will burn the most calories.

Running, lightsabers and sweat guaranteed. A fun workout that pushes your limits.
Saber Runner is captivating thanks to its dynamism and intensity.
The concept is simple yet powerful: you run in place in a room-scale environment, dodging obstacles, jumping, and slicing drones or beams with your lightsabers.
The dark and stylized space setting creates an immersive atmosphere, and each session is physically demanding—it's as much a game as it is a workout.
The "run, slice, dodge" mechanics are well-designed, and the adrenaline rush quickly as you feel the ghost drone catching up to you.
This game requires a bit of space and a reasonable level of fitness to move around!
The fast pace and exertion can be tiring, which is both a strength and sometimes a limitation for casual players.

developer_response.body:
Merci beaucoup pour votre retour détaillé !
Nous sommes ravis que l’intensité et le dynamisme de Saber Runner vous plaisent  c’est exactement l’expérience que nous voulions créer : un mélange d’adrénaline, de cardio et de fun avec les sabres laser.

Vous avez parfaitement résumé le concept : courir, esquiver, sauter et trancher dans une ambiance spatiale immersive. Le fait que vous ressentiez vraiment la pression du drone qui vous poursuit nous fait très plaisir !

C’est vrai que le jeu demande un peu d’espace et un minimum de condition physique, et nous comprenons que le rythme puisse être intense pour certains joueurs. Nous travaillons déjà sur des modes complémentaires pour rendre l’expérience plus accessible tout en gardant le côté sport pour ceux qui veulent se dépasser.

Merci encore pour votre soutien   cela nous motive énormément à continuer d’améliorer le jeu !

reviews.review_title: Great for a bit of exercise
reviews.review_description:
Manually run in place and defend yourself against enemies with light sabers what's not to like 


You may have to jump occasionally and my vertical is not very good 👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed feedback!
We’re really glad you enjoyed the workout style and the running-in-place mechanic , that means a lot to us.

About the jumping: the game is designed for players who want full-body movement, but we completely understand that not everyone can or wants to jump in real life. We’ve added clearer notes in the description so expectations are crystal-clear for new players.

If you’re enjoying the experience overall, a positive rating really helps our small indie team grow and reach more players, but of course, only if you genuinely feel the game deserves it.

Thanks again for giving it a try and for supporting VR fitness!

reviews.review_description: You will break a sweat quick running, jumping and slicing. Not a boring workout!
I really had fun playing this game. Works really well with the jumping.

SABER RUNNER: AEON INFINITY is a fitness-driven VR arcade experience that keeps you moving—dodging, slicing, and jumping through a sleek, space-themed universe. It’s energetic, innovative, and a whole lot of fun.

Currently in early access, the game already shows strong promise, with frequent updates planned and boss levels on the horizon. The creative mechanics make it stand out from typical VR fitness titles, blending arcade action with real movement for a challenging and rewarding workout.

A fresh and exciting concept—definitely one to watch as it grows.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! 🙏 If possible, please paste the review on SideQuest too,  it helps a ton!

reviews.review_description: The game is a great fitness workout. It has full body tracking therefore you have to walk standing in your place in order to move. You will fight enemies with your laser swords with techno music in background. Graphic details of hands and swords are TOP.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the great review!
We’re really happy that you’re enjoying the full-body workout aspect , the running-in-place system and the laser sword combat were designed exactly to make movement feel fun and immersive.

We’re also glad you liked the visuals and the techno vibe!
Our team spent a lot of time polishing the hands and saber effects, so it’s amazing to hear that it stands out for you.

More updates and modes are coming soon to make the experience even better.
Thanks again for playing and for supporting our small indie team!

Thanks a lot! 🙏 If possible, please paste the review on SideQuest too,  it helps a ton!
